overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a foggy rural landscape, transitioning from ancient ruins through forest trails, across fields with haystacks, and finally along a lakeside path toward a windmill.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient ruins site with overgrown vegetation

events.description: character walks away from ruins into wooded area

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks away from the ruined brick structures along a dirt path

wooden support structure against the ruins
narrow dirt trail winding through grass

segments.scene_description: Geralt begins near ancient brick ruins with wooden scaffolding, then walks along a dirt path leaving the ruins behind as the environment transitions to a wooded trail.

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking steadily along the forest path

entered.detail: tall trees lining both sides of the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a winding dirt path surrounded by trees and bushes, with fog visible in the distance through the forest.

scene_state.functional_zone: agricultural field with haystacks and stone walls

events.description: passes through stone wall opening into open field with haystacks
navigates through tall grass around haystacks

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks through tall grass fields, passing haystacks and stone walls

notable_agents.action: villager in red clothing walking through the field

entered.detail: low stone wall marking field boundary with gap for entry
traditional conical haystacks scattered throughout the field
golden tall grass covering the ground

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges from the forest into an open field of tall golden grass, passing through a stone wall gap and navigating between traditional haystacks while other villagers are visible working in the distance.

events.description: exits tall grass field and approaches lakeside path
windmill becomes clearly visible on the right side of path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks along the lakeside path toward a distant windmill

entered.detail: calm lake surface visible through the fog
stone windmill tower with wooden blades
large wooden gate structure spanning the path ahead

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the field and walks along a dirt path beside a calm lake, with a stone windmill becoming visible on the right as the path continues toward a wooden gate structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy rural landscape that transforms from ancient ruins into an open lakeside vista. It begins near brick ruins with wooden scaffolding, following Geralt as he leaves the structures behind to enter a wooded trail. As the camera moves along the winding dirt path, the dense trees and bushes gradually give way to a gap in a stone wall, opening the scene into a field of tall golden grass dotted with traditional haystacks and distant villagers. The environment then shifts from the open field to a dirt path beside a calm lake, where the view expands to reveal a stone windmill on the right before finally heading toward a wooden gate structure.
